titles.title: I've Got the Joy In My Heart

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've got the joy, joy, joy, joy down in my heart Where? Down in my heart! Where? Down in my heart! I've got the joy, joy, joy, joy down in my heart Down in my heart to stay

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I'm so happy So very happy I've got the love of Jesus in my heart Down in my heart And I'm so happy So very happy I've got the love of Jesus in my heart.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I've got the peace, peace, peace, peace down in my heart Where? Down in my heart! Where? Down in my heart! I've got the peace, peace, peace, peace down in my heart Down in my heart to stay

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: And I'm so happy So very happy I've got the love of Jesus in my heart Down in my heart And I'm so happy So very happy I've got the love of Jesus in my heart.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've got the Jesus, Jesus, Jesus, Jesus down in my heart Where? Down in my heart! Where? Down in my heart! I've got theJesus, Jesus, Jesus, Jesus down in my heart Down in my heart to stay

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: And I'm so happy So very happy I've got the love of Jesus in my heart Down in my heart And I'm so happy So very happy I've got the love of Jesus in my heart.
